content: The 'depth of unknown' fundamental property of general agents, which cannot be fully pre-specified or bounded by designers, can be measured and exploited for intrinsic motivation by repurposing the prediction error frameworks from curiosity-driven RL methods like ICM and RND. The degree of unresolvable uncertainty about an agent's own long-term open-ended behavior becomes the intrinsic reward signal that drives autonomous open-ended exploration of its own capabilities.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
